raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California has a high suicide rate, especially among young people and other vulnerable groups.",
    "COVID-19 has exacerbated the mental health crisis by increasing isolation, stress, and economic uncertainty.",
    "The proposed budget change includes $780,235 from the 2021-22 General Fund budget to support the Office of Suicide Prevention.",
    "Ongoing funding for the Office of Suicide Prevention is intended to help marshal resources and research to reduce suicide rates.",
    "A study by Harvard University reported that 36 percent of Americans felt 'serious loneliness' and 61 percent of those were aged 18 to 25.",
    "More than 40 percent of respondents reported an increase in loneliness since the pandemic began.",
    "The Office of Suicide Prevention aims to use a data-driven approach to suicide prevention and intervention across all communities."
  ]
}
```
